metadata.description: Installable geospatial skills for Claude Code and other AI agents

plugins.description: This skill should be used when working with GeoParquet files - the cloud-native format for geospatial vector data. Covers best practices for creating, optimizing, and distributing GeoParquet using gpio CLI and DuckDB.
plugins.name: geoparquet

plugins.description: This skill should be used when working with GDAL command line tools for raster and vector geospatial processing. Covers inspection, reprojection, clipping, raster conversion, mosaics, tiling, rasterization, and COG creation.
plugins.name: gdal
